title: Container export permission issues
body:
### Issue Description

Exported container can't be extracted locally nor started when imported back by Podman. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Pull image, start a container
2. Export the container 
3. Delete the container
4. Import the container
5. Try to start the imported image


### Describe the results you received

When trying to extract the container locally: 
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fe600370-eb01-425a-81c2-0895a5e788df)

When trying to start the image in CLI:
```
Error: preparing container a9735457b11286daaa2f7119f8e0be0f2bf3a6fdf0b579384a2a7e1a252bec2f for attach: crun: open executable: Operation not permitted: OCI permission denied
```

### Describe the results you expected

Archive extraction without problem. 
Container starting successfully and working.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
